notes: Comment buttons use MAX open_app button type instead of ordinary external https link.
open_app payload is sanitized to MAX-safe characters and uses handoff token when available.
Mini-app public/app.js now reads open_app payload as a launch source through a narrow parsing bridge.
Growth CTA 'Подключить комментарии' remains disabled through targeted growthLeadCard-only patch.
Silent menu callback fix remains active to suppress native MAX toast notifications such as 'Открыто'.
